Fractured Malachite Gear

Whenever the unit deals 320000 damage, they remove a random debuff and restore 100000 health.

Whenever the unit deals 1000000 damage, that unit and all allies in a small radius around them remove a random debuff and restore 150000 health.

Whenever the unit deals 1500000 damage, that unit and all allies remove a random debuff and restore 250000 health.

Requirements: 98-100
